programme.title: FishON | Spring Thaw on Frederick House Lake
programme.desc: Paul, Perry, and Dan head east of Timmins to the historic waters of Frederick House Lake for a late-season ice adventure under warm, spring-like skies. What starts as a perfect day on the hardwater quickly turns into a multispecies showcase—pike, perch, walleye, and sauger all keep the crew busy as the bite fires up. But as Northern Ontario weather often reminds us, conditions shift fast. With the wind picking up and clouds rolling in, the team wraps up an incredible day and makes their way home, grateful for one more memorable outing before the thaw.

programme.title: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"

We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.

programme.title: Locked On HBCU
programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.desc: In this episode of GoPro Original Series DRIVEN, we continue our in-depth look at X Games star and snowmobile legend Chris Burandt. Join him on an adrenaline-fueled journey to uncover what drives his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. The second part goes inside the life of three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano. Watch as he pushes the limits on the track and discovers how he uses his racing platform to make a difference in the lives of others.

programme.title: S1E3 Driven
programme.desc: Three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano continues to push the limits on the track while finding new ways to use his racing platform to make a positive impact on others. In this episode of GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN, step into the world of DC Shoes co-founder, rally car driver, and marketing mastermind Ken Block. Strap in for an electrifying journey through the moments and passions that have fueled his remarkable career.

programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

programme.title: S1E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. programme.title: S2E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: From polar bears to roaring lions—this is GoPro Adventures at its wildest. Dive into jaw-dropping encounters with lions, whales, turtles, giraffes, and watch “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson at his South African sanctuary, where rescued predators find a second chance. It’s the ultimate fusion of wildlife wonder and high-octane thrills—you won’t be able to look away.

programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ infamous Western The Outlaw blazes with passion, rivalry, and danger. When Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he becomes entangled in a volatile triangle with gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.
